rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §29.003, which governs special education eligibility criteria. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 29.003. ELIGIBILITY CRITERIA. (a) The agency shall develop specific eligibility criteria based on the general classifications established by this section and in accordance with federal law.
_note: Rule text concerns special education eligibility; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No intersection between the two provisions.
